lowValueCriteria.description: Assertion verifies implementation detail already enforced by canonical parity/contract tests and does not add distinct behavior signal.
Assertion only checks symbol/value non-emptiness already guaranteed by stronger structural equality or contract mapping assertions.

removedTests.rationale: This test only asserts that one constant appears in the known event set. The canonical runtime-event parity suites already verify full backend and frontend alignment with the contract, which is strictly stronger coverage.

tests.whyStronger: Validates the entire backend KNOWN_RUNTIME_EVENTS set against canonical contract events, subsuming single-event membership assertions.
Enforces backend/frontend/runtime-contract identity by key and value, preventing drift that a single constant-membership assertion cannot detect.

removedTests.rationale: The removed test only checks that the contract version is a non-empty string. A stronger parity test already validates exact equality between runtime service version and contract file version.

tests.whyStronger: Checks exact version equality against canonical contract source instead of only non-empty-string existence.
